Comfrt: 

Hey! We noticed you have an item from our top-selling collection in your cart.

Our stock is very low, so we can only hold your cart for 10 more minutes. 

Before we sell out - here is an extra 15% OFF!

code: COMEBACK15

 https://comfrt.attn.tv/aSAS9rKE-aeR .

700,000 amazing customers claimed our clothing has helped with stress & anxiety relief. This will be the comfiest hoodie you ever put on.

Code: COMEBACK15 (24hr)

https://comfrt.attn.tv/avPNO0stwVjy .

Comfrt: Happy National Hug Day!

Be sure to squeeze your loved ones a little tighter today, and don't forget to treat yourself to the hug you can wear.

Stock is super limited, so grab your favorites while you can: https://comfrt.attn.tv/akZbWYNvLz1V .

P.S. Use code HUG15 within the next 24 hours for 15% off sitewide.

The perfect Valentine's gift is here. Designed to bring warmth, comfort, and connection, it's the perfect set to show others, or yourself, some love.

Stock is extremely limited, so don't miss out: comfrt.attn.tv/aEpNwcCe1jv1 . 

P.S. We love YOU!

We recently launched new collections & colors that our customers are in love with!

We just did a restock and wanted to let you know first!

When you shop use code VIP20 for 20% OFF 

 https://comfrt.attn.tv/arjfrSNIBkZ5 .

Comfrt: Hi, this is Samantha. Thanks for reaching out! You can log-in to your account and find the order history, as well as finding the confirmation email sent to you upon placing the order.

I see Order #1741756 which is for pre-order! We appreciate your patience in waiting for it to ship out, yu can find the scheduled date in the email confirmation. Please let me know if there's anything else I can do for you today!
